common.platformTagline: Oman's leading platform for buying and selling cars with confidence.

footer.address: Sultanate of Oman, Muscat, Al Ghubra

home.welcomeDesc: Oman's #1 auto marketplace — buy, sell, rent, parts, services, transport & jobs in one place.
home.searchEasyDesc: Use the search engine to find what you need quickly — choose a category and type what you're looking for.
home.browseSectionsDesc: Cars, spare parts, car services, transport & shipping, trips & subscriptions, and driver jobs.
home.addListingDesc: Post your listing in seconds and connect with thousands of interested buyers in Oman.
home.latestCarsDesc: New and used cars for sale and rent in Oman
home.driverJobsDesc: Find a professional driver or offer your services
home.servicesAndTransportDesc: Everything you need for your car and transport in one place
home.newsletterDesc: Join thousands of users and get notified about the latest cars, services, and jobs in Oman.
home.freeNoSpam: Totally free · No spam · Unsubscribe anytime
